domain_reseller_message_text: As a member of the domain name reseller program, you currently benefit from reduced prices on your domain names.
domain_reseller_general_informations_lab: Domain names registered at reduced prices
domain_reseller_general_informations_no_: No domain name linked to the program
domain_reseller_associate_modal_title: Choose the domain names to link
domain_reseller_associate_modal_descript: Are you sure you want to link these domain names to the billing NIC for this account?
domain_reseller_associate_modal_associat: An error occurred while requesting a contact change: {{error}}.
The contact change request has been submitted successfully. The contacts involved in the request will receive an email containing the validation procedure.

You already submitted a request in the past to link the {{domain}} to your domain name reseller pack. A confirmation email was sent to the billing contact for the service. Please check your mailbox to confirm the change.

You submitted a request to link {{count}} services to your domain name reseller pack. Please check the mailbox of the billing contact linked to each of these services to confirm the change. As some requests were made on earlier dates, their confirmation emails were also sent on those dates.
domain_reseller_associate_modal_loading: Your domain names might take a few minutes to load, based on the size of your portfolio.
